MITRE ATT&CK Enterprise STIX bundle -- v13 build vendored copy
================================================================

Source repository : https://github.com/mitre-attack/attack-stix-data
Source path       : enterprise-attack/enterprise-attack.json
Bundle id         : bundle--9ed7099a-63b8-4e49-92c7-547d39aa29e0
STIX spec version : 2.0
Vendored on       : 2026-04-23 (cache snapshot under cpt/cache/raw/)
Used by           : v13 SFT (tmpl_gen/templates/05072026/v13_plan.txt
                    sec 4.4 + sec 5.2):
                    - tmpl_gen/scripts/taa_canon_generator.py
                      (intrusion-set + uses-relationship -> attack-pattern
                       traversal feeding TAA.CANON.{1,2,3})

Licence (per the MITRE ATT&CK Terms of Use,
https://attack.mitre.org/resources/legal-and-branding/terms-of-use/):
  - The MITRE Corporation publishes the ATT&CK knowledge base
    (techniques, tactics, groups, software, mitigations, data sources,
    relationships) for free, including for commercial use, subject to
    the ATT&CK Terms of Use.
  - Permitted: redistribution, modification, derivative works, including
    commercial use, provided the attribution and trademark conditions
    are met.
  - Required attribution (verbatim from the Terms of Use):
      "(C) 2025 The MITRE Corporation. This work is reproduced and
      distributed with the permission of The MITRE Corporation."
  - Trademark notice (preserved from the bundle's marking-definition):
      "MITRE ATT&CK and ATT&CK are registered trademarks of The MITRE
      Corporation."
  - Source attribution tag carried by upstream rows: per
    v13_plan.txt sec 10.3, the v13 TAA.CANON generator emits
    `athena-cti-db-internal` for the OUTPUT rows because the
    instruction-tuning prompts/answers are Athena-curated transformative
    work; this PROVENANCE.txt is the upstream licence chain record
    acknowledging the MITRE-attack seed.

File integrity (SHA-256 at vendor time):
  enterprise-attack.json
    628c4fc3c01b9ef37e1cd84ca3c421e1d43950a43464a14aabd1a7089601dc45

Bundle composition at vendor time:
  total objects        : 24,771
  intrusion-set        :    187
  attack-pattern       :    835
  malware              :    696
  tool                 :     91
  course-of-action     :    268
  campaign             :     52
  relationship         : 20,048
  x-mitre-tactic       :     14
  x-mitre-matrix       :      1
  x-mitre-data-source  :     38
  x-mitre-data-component:   109
  x-mitre-detection-strategy: 691
  x-mitre-analytic     :  1,739
  marking-definition   :      1
  identity             :      1

Refresh policy:
  v13 ships against this snapshot for reproducibility. v14 may refresh
  to a newer release; the seed-provenance gate
  (tmpl_gen/scripts/check_seed_provenance.py) verifies the SHA-256
  against the value recorded above.

Refresh procedure (when authorising v14 refresh):
  1. Identify a target ATT&CK release at
     https://github.com/mitre-attack/attack-stix-data/releases
  2. curl -fsSL -o cpt/cache/raw/mitre_attack_enterprise/enterprise-attack.json \
         https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mitre-attack/attack-stix-data/<TAG>/enterprise-attack/enterprise-attack.json
  3. shasum -a 256 cpt/cache/raw/mitre_attack_enterprise/enterprise-attack.json
  4. Update the SHA-256 + bundle composition counts in this file.
  5. Re-run the seed-provenance gate and the v13 build watcher.
